---
title: "About"
---

I am a Business Analytics and Business Information Systems student at Monash,
working in data analytics with a focus on turning messy operational data into
decisions. My work sits across three languages: R for statistics and
econometrics, Python for machine learning pipelines, and SQL for the data
underneath both.

<!-- Replace the placeholder text above and the details below with your own. -->

## What I work on

- Panel and mixed-effects econometrics applied to social-science questions
- Machine learning with careful validation design to prevent leakage
- Reconciliation and variance analysis on financial and operational data
- API-driven data collection where the data does not arrive as a tidy CSV

## Tools

R (tidyverse, ggplot2, fixest, lme4, mgcv) · Python (scikit-learn, LightGBM,
matplotlib) · SQL · Excel · Quarto · Git

## Elsewhere

- [GitHub](https://github.com/tlabagala)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/yourusername)
- [Download CV](assets/cv.pdf)

<!-- Drop a cv.pdf into assets/ to enable the CV link, or remove that line. -->
